items.title: Fever shake off ugly start, outlast Mercury in physical, emotional finish
items.body_excerpt: The Indiana Fever overcame an awful first quarter and a physical, tension-filled fourth to beat the Phoenix Mercury 86-77 on Monday night at Gainbridge Fieldhouse. It was the first meeting of the season between the two teams — somehow, after the Fever had already played Atlanta…

items.title: Giannis Traded to the Heat, Julius Randle/Nic Claxton Trade, & Trae Young Max | Third Apron Podcast
items.body_excerpt: It’s finally over! We discuss the trade sending Giannis Antetokounmpo to the Heat, why the Timberwolves dumped Julius Randle, the Bulls getting Nic Claxton. Also, Ayo Dosunmu and Trae Young got HOW MUCH? You can follow Yossi on: Twitter: https://twitter.com/YossiGozlan BlueSky:…

items.title: Unpacking the Giannis Antetokounmpo Trade
items.body_excerpt: It finally happened. After more than a year of speculation, the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade saga is over . The Bucks are trading him and Bobby Portis to the Heat for Tyler Herro, Jaime Jaquez Jr., Kel’el Ware, Kasparas Jakucionis, the 13th overall pick in tonight’s draft, 2031…
